utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Could you help me with something ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: The patient I am looking for has a broken leg and is in a wheelchair .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: And umm , he is like early to mid ... thirties , very attractive .

utterances.speaker: Nurse
utterances.text: I think I know who you are talking about .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh yay ! Great ! Okay , what room number is he in ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_I know who you are talking about .

utterances.speaker: Nurse
utterances.text: I am sorry , that information is restricted to hospital staff

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh , she is with me . Dr . Drake Remoray .

utterances.speaker: Nurse
utterances.text: Dr . Drake who ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_she is with me . Dr . Drake Remoray .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Remoray . It is Portuguese . We need that information . I am a doctor .

utterances.speaker: Nurse
utterances.text: A doctor at this hospital ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Damnit woman we are losing precious time ! Now do you want this man blood on your head ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hands .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hands !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is absolutely essential that you tell me what room the man my assistant described is staying in .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: He is a patient of mine , I have been treating him for years !

utterances.speaker: Nurse
utterances.text: He is in room 816 .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: 816 , thank you !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Thank you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And what is his name ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No !
